channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: This town found clean energy deep inside old coal mines
item.description: Cumberland, B.C. is reimagining its coal mining past as a clean energy opportunity. Water trapped in abandoned mine tunnels could be used in a geother...

item.title: Your DNA may predict your future success more than your upbringing
item.description: A new twin study suggests your genes may play a bigger role in your future success than your upbringing. Researchers found that IQ, which is largely g...

item.title: Scientists accidentally discover DNA that breaks the rules of life
item.description: A routine experiment with a new single-cell DNA sequencing method turned into a surprising scientific twist when researchers stumbled upon a bizarre g...

item.title: People once risked everything just to keep their hats on
item.description: Centuries ago in England, hats weren’t just accessories—they were statements of power and rebellion. Refusing to remove a hat could challenge authorit...
